title: crotalaria humbertiana
intro: Crotalaria humbertiana is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to Madagascar, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria humbertiana is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or added to creams and ointments for topical application.
